name: Pregnancy Modifier App
description:
Honestly, I just wanted to make something pregnancy-related. And I saw a comic featuring such an App and knew I wanted to do a bot like it. Just have fun with the App and let your preggo kink run wild.

I hope you guys can enjoy it, and if you're not into preggo stuff, just don't interact with it.
I know it's not everyone's cup of tea, so I won't force ya to try or like it, though I'm asking you to try it.

I tried to make it AnyPOV, but there's no MPreg (not sorry).
If you have ideas to add to the App, please let me know ^^.

For the best experience, set the amount of Tokens to 0. The temperature is yours to choose.

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like, are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any "thumbs down" comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective. Thanks.

Edit: The Pregnancy Transfer Update

Since this bot is doing insanely good, I thought, why not also add the option for some Pregnancy Transfer? Idk, have fun and all that.

Edit 2: Now you, as the Femal,e can let your perfect Boyfriend take control over the App, and you.
creator: Etoro
